mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT a.dog_number, a.dog_name, a.dog_age, a.dog_breed, s.shelter_name, a.dog_safe_date FROM ddd_archive a JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON a.user_number = s.user_number ORDER BY a.dog_safe_date ASC) WHERE rownum <= 5

SELECT a.dog_number, a.dog_name, a.dog_age, a.dog_weight, a.dog_breed, s.shelter_name, a.dog_safe_date FROM ddd_archive a JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON a.user_number = s.user_number
a.dog_breed LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
s.shelter_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
( a.dog_breed LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR s.shelter_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY a.dog_archive_date DESC

SELECT a.dog_number, a.dog_name, a.dog_age, a.dog_weight, a.dog_breed, s.shelter_name, a.dog_safe_date FROM ddd_archive a JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON a.user_number = s.user_number ORDER BY a.dog_archive_date DESC

SELECT a.dog_number, a.dog_name, a.dog_age, a.dog_weight, a.dog_breed, s.shelter_name, a.dog_safe_date, a.dog_detail, ai.archive_img_path FROM ddd_archive a JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON a.user_number = s.user_number LEFT JOIN ( SELECT i.dog_number, i.archive_img_path FROM ddd_archive_img i JOIN ( SELECT dog_number, MIN(archive_img_number) AS min_img_number FROM ddd_archive_img GROUP BY dog_number ) m ON i.dog_number = m.dog_number AND i.archive_img_number = m.min_img_number ) ai ON a.dog_number = ai.dog_number WHERE a.dog_number = #{dog_number}
